title: Vanilla Emissives X Ore Outlines
description: This RP makes Ore Outlines compatible with "Vanilla Emissives", or short, glowing Ore Outlines.
body: This Resource Pack makes Ore Outlines compatible with "[Vanilla Emissives](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-emissives)", or short, glowing Ore Outlines. No mods required. [Vanilla Emissives](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-emissives) is required. This Resource Pack must be over [Vanilla Emissives](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-emissives), when not, it won't work. Same as [Vanilla Emissives](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-emissives), it does not use core shaders, so is compatible with Sodium and Iris.
